Name: Weedle
Attacks: [{'name': 'Multiply', 'cost': ['G'], 'damage': '0', 'effect': 'Put 1 random Weedle from your deck onto your Bench.'}]
Flavor Text: Often found in forests and grasslands. It has a sharp, toxic barb of around two inches on top of its head.

Name: Kakuna
Attacks: [{'name': 'String Shot', 'cost': ['G'], 'damage': '20', 'effect': "Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed."}]
Flavor Text: Almost incapable of moving, this Pokémon can only harden its shell to protect itself when it is in danger.

Name: Beedrill ex
Attacks: [{'name': 'Crushing Spear', 'cost': ['GG'], 'damage': '80', 'effect': "Discard a random Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon."}]

Name: Pinsir
Attacks: [{'name': 'Guillotine Rush', 'cost': ['GCC'], 'damage': '50+', 'effect': 'Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 40 more damage for each heads.'}]
Flavor Text: These Pokémon judge one another based on pincers. Thicker, more impressive pincers make for more popularity with the opposite gender.

Name: Sprigatito
Attacks: [{'name': 'Cry for Help', 'cost': ['G'], 'damage': '0', 'effect': 'Put 1 random [G] Pokémon from your deck into your hand.'}]
Flavor Text: Its fluffy fur is similar in composition to plants. This Pokémon frequently washes its face to keep it from drying out.

Name: Floragato
Attacks: [{'name': 'Slash', 'cost': ['GG'], 'damage': '40', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: Floragato deftly wields the vine hidden beneath its long fur, slamming the hard flower bud against its opponents.

Name: Meowscarada
Attacks: [{'name': 'Fighting Claws', 'cost': ['GG'], 'damage': '60+', 'effect': "If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex, this attack does 70 more damage."}]
Flavor Text: This Pokémon uses the reflective fur lining its cape to camouflage the stem of its flower, creating the illusion that the flower is floating.

Name: Charmander
Attacks: [{'name': 'Combustion', 'cost': ['R'], 'damage': '20', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: It has a preference for hot things. When it rains, steam is said to spout from the tip of its tail.

Name: Charmeleon
Attacks: [{'name': 'Combustion', 'cost': ['RR'], 'damage': '40', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: It has a barbaric nature. In battle, it whips its fiery tail around and slashes away with sharp claws.

Name: Charizard ex
Attacks: [{'name': 'Stoke', 'cost': ['R'], 'damage': '0', 'effect': 'Take 3 [R] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon.'}, {'name': 'Steam Artillery', 'cost': ['RRRCC'], 'damage': '150', 'effect': ''}]

Name: Magmar
Attacks: [{'name': 'Flare', 'cost': ['R'], 'damage': '20', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: Magmar dispatches its prey with fire. But it regrets this habit once it realizes that it has burned its intended prey to a charred crisp.

Name: Magmortar
Attacks: [{'name': 'Smoke Bomb', 'cost': ['RRC'], 'damage': '70', 'effect': "During your opponent's next turn, if the Defending Pokémon tries to use an attack, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack doesn't happen."}]
Flavor Text: When Magmortar inhales deeply, the fire burning in its belly intensifies, rising in temperature to over 3,600 degrees Fahrenheit.

Name: Paldean Tauros
Attacks: [{'name': 'Blaze Tackle', 'cost': ['RCC'], 'damage': '80', 'effect': 'This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.'}]
Flavor Text: When heated by fire energy, its horns can get hotter than 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit. Those gored by them will suffer both wounds and burns.

Name: Tentacool
Attacks: [{'name': 'Rain Splash', 'cost': ['W'], 'damage': '10', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: Tentacool is not a particularly strong swimmer. It drifts across the surface of shallow seas as it searches for prey.

Name: Tentacruel
Attacks: [{'name': 'Wave Splash', 'cost': ['W'], 'damage': '40', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: When the red orbs on Tentacruel’s head glow brightly, watch out. The Pokémon is about to fire off a burst of ultrasonic waves.

Name: Buizel
Attacks: [{'name': 'Water Gun', 'cost': ['W'], 'damage': '10', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: It inflates its flotation sac, keeping its face above water in order to watch for prey movement.

Name: Floatzel
Attacks: [{'name': 'Water Arrow', 'cost': ['W'], 'damage': '0', 'effect': "This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon."}]
Flavor Text: With its flotation sac inflated, it can carry people on its back. It deflates the sac before it dives.

Name: Wiglett
Attacks: [{'name': 'Spring Out', 'cost': ['W'], 'damage': '0', 'effect': "1 of your opponent's Pokémon is chosen at random. Do 30 damage to it."}]
Flavor Text: This Pokémon can pick up the scent of a Veluza just over 65 feet away and will hide itself in the sand.

Name: Wugtrio ex
Attacks: [{'name': 'Pop Out Throughout', 'cost': ['WWW'], 'damage': '0', 'effect': "1 of your opponent's Pokémon is chosen at random 3 times. For each time a Pokémon was chosen, do 50 damage to it."}]

Name: Dondozo
Attacks: [{'name': 'Ocean Cyclone', 'cost': ['WWCC'], 'damage': '80', 'effect': "This attack also does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon."}]
Flavor Text: This Pokémon is a glutton, but it’s bad at getting food. It teams up with a Tatsugiri to catch prey.

Name: Tatsugiri
Attacks: [{'name': 'Rain Splash', 'cost': ['W'], 'damage': '20', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: This is a small dragon Pokémon. It lives inside the mouth of Dondozo to protect itself from enemies on the outside.

Name: Pikachu ex
Attacks: [{'name': 'Thunderbolt', 'cost': ['LLL'], 'damage': '150', 'effect': 'Discard all Energy from this Pokémon.'}]

Name: Voltorb
Attacks: [{'name': 'Lightning Ball', 'cost': ['L'], 'damage': '10', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: It rolls to move. If the ground is uneven, a sudden jolt from hitting a bump can cause it to explode.

Name: Electrode
Attacks: [{'name': 'Tumbling Attack', 'cost': ['LL'], 'damage': '50+', 'effect': 'Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.'}]
Flavor Text: The more energy it charges up, the faster it gets. But this also makes it more likely to explode.

Name: Pachirisu
Attacks: [{'name': 'Plasma', 'cost': ['L'], 'damage': '10', 'effect': 'Take a [L] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched [L] Pokémon.'}]
Flavor Text: It’s one of the kinds of Pokémon with electric cheek pouches. It shoots charges from its tail.

Name: Pawmi
Attacks: [{'name': 'Punch', 'cost': ['L'], 'damage': '20', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: It has underdeveloped electric sacs on its cheeks. These sacs can produce electricity only if Pawmi rubs them furiously with the pads on its forepaws.

Name: Pawmo
Attacks: [{'name': 'Punch', 'cost': ['LL'], 'damage': '40', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: When its group is attacked, Pawmo is the first to leap into battle, defeating enemies with a fighting technique that utilizes electric shocks.

Name: Pawmot
Attacks: [{'name': 'Electric Punch', 'cost': ['LL'], 'damage': '70', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: This Pokémon normally is slow to react, but once it enters battle, it will strike down its enemies with lightning-fast movements.

Name: Abra
Attacks: [{'name': 'Psyshot', 'cost': ['P'], 'damage': '20', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: This Pokémon uses its psychic powers while it sleeps. The contents of Abra’s dreams affect the powers that the Pokémon wields.

Name: Kadabra
Attacks: [{'name': 'Psyshot', 'cost': ['P'], 'damage': '30', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: Using its psychic power, Kadabra levitates as it sleeps. It uses its springy tail as a pillow.

Name: Alakazam
Attacks: [{'name': 'Psychic Suppression', 'cost': ['PP'], 'damage': '80', 'effect': "This attack also does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that has any Energy attached."}]
Flavor Text: It has an incredibly high level of intelligence. Some say that Alakazam remembers everything that ever happens to it, from birth till death.

Name: Mr. Mime
Attacks: [{'name': 'Juggling', 'cost': ['PC'], 'damage': '20x', 'effect': 'Flip 4 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.'}]
Flavor Text: The broadness of its hands may be no coincidence—many scientists believe its palms became enlarged specifically for pantomiming.

Name: Drifloon
Attacks: [{'name': 'Ram', 'cost': ['P'], 'damage': '20', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: It is whispered that any child who mistakes Drifloon for a balloon and holds on to it could wind up missing.

Name: Drifblim
Attacks: [{'name': 'Gust', 'cost': ['P'], 'damage': '40', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: It can generate and release gas within its body. That’s how it can control the altitude of its drift.

Name: Giratina ex
Attacks: [{'name': 'Chaotic Impact', 'cost': ['PPPC'], 'damage': '130', 'effect': 'This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.'}]

Name: Gimmighoul
Attacks: [{'name': 'Chest-ouflage', 'cost': ['C'], 'damage': '0', 'effect': "Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from—and effects of—attacks done to this Pokémon."}]
Flavor Text: This Pokémon was born inside a treasure chest about 1,500 years ago. It sucks the life-force out of scoundrels who try to steal the treasure.

Name: Machop
Attacks: [{'name': 'Low Kick', 'cost': ['F'], 'damage': '20', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: Its whole body is composed of muscles. Even though it’s the size of a human child, it can hurl 100 grown-ups.

Name: Machoke
Attacks: [{'name': 'Pummel', 'cost': ['FF'], 'damage': '30+', 'effect': 'Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.'}]
Flavor Text: Its muscular body is so powerful, it must wear a power-save belt to be able to regulate its motions.

Name: Machamp
Attacks: [{'name': 'Power Press', 'cost': ['FF'], 'damage': '70+', 'effect': 'If this Pokémon has at least 2 extra [F] Energy attached, this attack does 50 more damage.'}]
Flavor Text: It quickly swings its four arms to rock its opponents with ceaseless punches and chops from all angles.

Name: Hitmonlee
Attacks: [{'name': 'Kick', 'cost': ['F'], 'damage': '30', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: This amazing Pokémon has an awesome sense of balance. It can kick in succession from any position.

Name: Hitmonchan
Attacks: [{'name': 'Magnum Punch', 'cost': ['FFF'], 'damage': '90', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: Its punches slice the air. They are launched at such high speed, even a slight graze could cause a burn.

Name: Riolu
Attacks: [{'name': 'Punch', 'cost': ['FF'], 'damage': '40', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: They communicate with one another using their auras. They are able to run all through the night.

Name: Lucario ex
Attacks: [{'name': 'Aura Sphere', 'cost': ['FFF'], 'damage': '100', 'effect': "This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon."}]

Name: Flamigo
Attacks: [{'name': 'Double Kick', 'cost': ['FF'], 'damage': '50x', 'effect': 'Flip 2 coins. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.'}]
Flavor Text: This Pokémon apparently ties the base of its neck into a knot so that energy stored in its belly does not escape from its beak.

Name: Ekans
Attacks: [{'name': 'Ram', 'cost': ['DC'], 'damage': '30', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: By dislocating its jaw, it can swallow prey larger than itself. After a meal, it curls up and rests.

Name: Arbok
Attacks: [{'name': 'Venomous Fang', 'cost': ['DDC'], 'damage': '70', 'effect': "Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned."}]
Flavor Text: After stunning its opponents with the pattern on its stomach, it quickly wraps them up in its body and waits for them to stop moving.

Name: Paldean Wooper
Attacks: [{'name': 'Poison Jab', 'cost': ['D'], 'damage': '10', 'effect': "Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned."}]
Flavor Text: After losing a territorial struggle, Wooper began living on land. The Pokémon changed over time, developing a poisonous film to protect its body.

Name: Paldean Clodsire ex
Card Type: Pokémon - Stage 1 - Evolves from Paldean Wooper
Attacks: [{'name': 'Venoshock', 'cost': ['DD'], 'damage': '60+', 'effect': "If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Poisoned, this attack does 60 more damage."}]

Name: Spiritomb
Attacks: [{'name': 'Confuse Ray', 'cost': ['D'], 'damage': '20', 'effect': "Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused."}]
Flavor Text: Its constant mischief and misdeeds resulted in it being bound to an Odd Keystone by a mysterious spell.

Name: Shroodle
Attacks: [{'name': 'Gnaw', 'cost': ['D'], 'damage': '20', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: Though usually a mellow Pokémon, it will sink its sharp, poison-soaked front teeth into any that anger it, causing paralysis in the object of its ire.

Name: Grafaiai
Attacks: [{'name': 'Bite', 'cost': ['DD'], 'damage': '40', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: The color of the poisonous saliva depends on what the Pokémon eats. Grafaiai covers its fingers in its saliva and draws patterns on trees in forests.

Name: Tinkatink
Attacks: [{'name': 'Corkscrew Punch', 'cost': ['M'], 'damage': '20', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: It swings its handmade hammer around to protect itself, but the hammer is often stolen by Pokémon that eat metal.

Name: Tinkatuff
Attacks: [{'name': 'Tenacious Hammer', 'cost': ['MM'], 'damage': '30+', 'effect': 'Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.'}]
Flavor Text: This Pokémon will attack groups of Pawniard and Bisharp, gathering metal from them in order to create a large and sturdy hammer.

Name: Tinkaton ex
Attacks: [{'name': 'Terrific Thumping', 'cost': ['MMC'], 'damage': '80+', 'effect': 'Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 80 more damage.'}]

Name: Varoom
Attacks: [{'name': 'Headbutt', 'cost': ['M'], 'damage': '10', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: It is said that this Pokémon was born when an unknown poison Pokémon entered and inspirited an engine left at a scrap-processing factory.

Name: Revavroom
Attacks: [{'name': 'Spinning Drift', 'cost': ['MMC'], 'damage': '70', 'effect': "Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from—and effects of—attacks done to this Pokémon."}]
Flavor Text: It creates a gas out of poison and minerals from rocks. It then detonates the gas in its cylinders— now numbering eight—to generate energy.

Name: Gholdengo
Attacks: [{'name': 'Scintillating Surfing', 'cost': ['MCC'], 'damage': '50x', 'effect': 'Flip a coin for each [M] Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.'}]
Flavor Text: Its body seems to be made up of 1,000 coins. This Pokémon gets along well with others and is quick to make friends with anybody.

Name: Rattata
Attacks: [{'name': 'Tackle', 'cost': ['C'], 'damage': '10', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: Its incisors grow continuously throughout its life. If its incisors get too long, this Pokémon becomes unable to eat, and it starves to death.

Name: Raticate
Attacks: [{'name': 'Tackle', 'cost': ['CC'], 'damage': '50', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: People say that it fled from its enemies by using its small webbed hind feet to swim from island to island in Alola.

Name: Jigglypuff
Attacks: [{'name': 'Rollout', 'cost': ['C'], 'damage': '20', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: It hugely inflates its stomach and sings a mysterious melody. If you hear this melody, you’ll become sleepy right away.

Name: Wigglytuff
Attacks: [{'name': 'Gentle Slap', 'cost': ['CC'], 'damage': '50', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: It has a very fine fur. Take care not to make it angry, or it may inflate steadily and hit with a body slam.

Name: Lickitung
Attacks: [{'name': 'Rollout', 'cost': ['CC'], 'damage': '30', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: If this Pokémon’s sticky saliva gets on you and you don’t clean it off, an intense itch will set in. The itch won’t go away, either.

Name: Lickilicky
Attacks: [{'name': 'Rollout', 'cost': ['CCC'], 'damage': '70', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: Lickilicky’s strange tongue can stretch to many times the length of its body. No one has figured out how Lickilicky’s tongue can stretch so far.

Name: Bidoof
Attacks: [{'name': 'Headbutt', 'cost': ['CC'], 'damage': '30', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: With nerves of steel, nothing can perturb it. It is more agile and active than it appears.

Name: Bibarel ex
Attacks: [{'name': 'Carefree Press', 'cost': ['CCCC'], 'damage': '100', 'effect': 'Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.'}]

Name: Buneary
Attacks: [{'name': 'Pound', 'cost': ['C'], 'damage': '20', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: If both of Buneary’s ears are rolled up, something is wrong with its body or mind. It’s a sure sign the Pokémon is in need of care.

Name: Lopunny
Attacks: [{'name': 'Hopping Shot', 'cost': ['C'], 'damage': '30', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: Lopunny is constantly monitoring its surroundings. If danger approaches, this Pokémon responds with superdestructive kicks.

Name: Cyclizar
Attacks: [{'name': 'Overacceleration', 'cost': ['C'], 'damage': '20', 'effect': "During your next turn, this Pokémon's Overacceleration attack does +20 damage."}]
Flavor Text: Apparently Cyclizar has been allowing people to ride on its back since ancient times. Depictions of this have been found in 10,000-year-old murals.

Flavor Text: In rare cases, it molts and sheds its scales. Medicine containing its scales as an ingredient will make a weary body feel invigorated.

Name: Garchomp
Attacks: [{'name': 'Dragon Claw', 'cost': ['WF'], 'damage': '100', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: It is said that when one runs at high speed, its wings create blades of wind that can fell nearby trees.

Name: Lickitung
Attacks: [{'name': 'Tongue Slap', 'cost': ['CCC'], 'damage': '50', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: If this Pokémon’s sticky saliva gets on you and you don’t clean it off, an intense itch will set in. The itch won’t go away, either.

Name: Lickilicky ex
Attacks: [{'name': 'Licking Fury', 'cost': ['CCCC'], 'damage': '100+', 'effect': 'Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 40 more damage for each heads.'}]

Name: Eevee
Attacks: [{'name': 'Quick Attack', 'cost': ['C'], 'damage': '10+', 'effect': 'Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.'}]
Flavor Text: Its ability to evolve into many forms allows it to adapt smoothly and perfectly to any environment.

Name: Porygon
Attacks: [{'name': 'Beam', 'cost': ['C'], 'damage': '20', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: State-of-the-art technology was used to create Porygon. It was the first artificial Pokémon to be created via computer programming.

Name: Porygon2
Attacks: [{'name': 'Sharpen', 'cost': ['C'], 'damage': '30', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: This is a Porygon that was updated with special data. Porygon2 develops itself by learning about many different subjects all on its own.

Name: Porygon-Z
Attacks: [{'name': 'Buggy Beam', 'cost': ['CCC'], 'damage': '80', 'effect': 'Change the type of the next Energy that will be generated for your opponent to 1 of the following at random: [G],[R],[W],[L],[P],[F],[D], or [M].'}]
Flavor Text: Porygon-Z had a program installed to allow it to move between dimensions, but the program also caused instability in Porygon-Z’s behavior.

Name: Aipom
Attacks: [{'name': 'Tail Jab', 'cost': ['C'], 'damage': '20', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: As it did more and more with its tail, its hands became clumsy. It makes its nest high in the treetops.

Name: Ambipom
Attacks: [{'name': 'Double Hit', 'cost': ['C'], 'damage': '40x', 'effect': 'Flip 2 coins. This attack does 40 damage for each heads.'}]
Flavor Text: It uses its tails for everything. If it wraps both of its tails around you and gives you a squeeze, that’s proof it really likes you.

Name: Starly
Attacks: [{'name': 'Pluck', 'cost': ['C'], 'damage': '20', 'effect': "Before doing damage, discard all Pokémon Tools from your opponent's Active Pokémon."}]
Flavor Text: They flock around mountains and fields, chasing after bug Pokémon. Their singing is noisy and annoying.

Name: Staravia
Attacks: [{'name': 'Wing Attack', 'cost': ['CC'], 'damage': '40', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: Recognizing their own weakness, they always live in a group. When alone, a Staravia cries noisily.

Name: Staraptor
Attacks: [{'name': 'Clutch', 'cost': ['CCC'], 'damage': '80', 'effect': "During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat."}]
Flavor Text: When Staravia evolve into Staraptor, they leave the flock to live alone. They have sturdy wings.

Name: Bidoof
Attacks: [{'name': 'Super Fang', 'cost': ['CC'], 'damage': '0', 'effect': "Halve your opponent's Active Pokémon's remaining HP, rounded down."}]
Flavor Text: With nerves of steel, nothing can perturb it. It is more agile and active than it appears.

Name: Bibarel
Attacks: [{'name': 'Rolling Tackle', 'cost': ['CC'], 'damage': '60', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: It busily makes its nest with stacks of branches and roots it has cut up with its sharp incisors.

Name: Buneary
Attacks: [{'name': 'Splash', 'cost': ['C'], 'damage': '10', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: If both of Buneary’s ears are rolled up, something is wrong with its body or mind. It’s a sure sign the Pokémon is in need of care.

Name: Lopunny
Attacks: [{'name': 'Jump Kick', 'cost': ['C'], 'damage': '20', 'effect': "This attack also does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon."}]
Flavor Text: Lopunny is constantly monitoring its surroundings. If danger approaches, this Pokémon responds with superdestructive kicks.

Name: Glameow
Attacks: [{'name': 'Pose', 'cost': ['C'], 'damage': '40', 'effect': 'Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.'}]
Flavor Text: It claws if displeased and purrs when affectionate. Its fickleness is very popular among some.

Name: Purugly
Attacks: [{'name': 'Interrupt', 'cost': ['CCC'], 'damage': '60', 'effect': "Your opponent reveals their hand. Choose a card you find there and shuffle it into your opponent's deck."}]
Flavor Text: It would claim another Pokémon’s nest as its own if it finds a nest sufficiently comfortable.

Name: Chatot
Attacks: [{'name': 'Fury Attack', 'cost': ['C'], 'damage': '20x', 'effect': 'Flip 3 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.'}]
Flavor Text: It mimics the cries of other Pokémon to trick them into thinking it’s one of them. This way they won’t attack it.

Name: Fan Rotom
Attacks: [{'name': 'Spin Storm', 'cost': ['CC'], 'damage': '0', 'effect': "Flip a coin. If heads, put your opponent's Active Pokémon into their hand."}]
Flavor Text: This Rotom has entered an electric fan. It smirks with satisfaction over a prank well pulled after it blows away everything around it.

Name: Regigigas
Attacks: [{'name': 'Raging Hammer', 'cost': ['CCCC'], 'damage': '50+', 'effect': 'This attack does more damage equal to the damage this Pokémon has on it.'}]
Flavor Text: It is said to have made Pokémon that look like itself from a special ice mountain, rocks, and magma.

Name: Tangrowth
Attacks: [{'name': 'Mega Drain', 'cost': ['GGGC'], 'damage': '90', 'effect': 'Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.'}]
Flavor Text: Tangrowth has two arms that it can extend as it pleases. Recent research has shown that these arms are, in fact, bundles of vines.

Name: Combee
Attacks: [{'name': 'Call for Family', 'cost': ['C'], 'damage': '0', 'effect': 'Put 1 random Basic Pokémon from your deck onto your Bench.'}]
Flavor Text: At night, Combee sleep in a group of about a hundred, packed closely together in a lump.

Name: Carnivine
Attacks: [{'name': 'Flog', 'cost': ['GGC'], 'damage': '40+', 'effect': 'Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 50 more damage.'}]
Flavor Text: It attracts prey with its sweet-smelling saliva, then chomps down. It takes a whole day to eat prey.

Name: Shaymin
Attacks: [{'name': 'Flop', 'cost': ['GC'], 'damage': '30', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: It can dissolve toxins in the air to instantly transform ruined land into a lush field of flowers.

Name: Mamoswine
Attacks: [{'name': 'Frosty Flattening', 'cost': ['WWCC'], 'damage': '120', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: This Pokémon can be spotted in wall paintings from as far back as 10,000 years ago. For a while, it was thought to have gone extinct.

Name: Gastrodon
Attacks: [{'name': 'Muddy Water', 'cost': ['WCC'], 'damage': '60', 'effect': "This attack also does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon."}]
Flavor Text: They normally inhabit rocky seashores, but in times of continuous rain, they can sometimes be found in the mountains, far from the sea.

Name: Manaphy
Attacks: [{'name': 'Oceanic Gift', 'cost': ['W'], 'damage': '0', 'effect': 'Choose 2 of your Benched Pokémon. For each of those Pokémon, take a [W] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to that Pokémon.'}]
Flavor Text: It is born with a wondrous power that lets it bond with any kind of Pokémon.

Name: Shinx
Attacks: [{'name': 'Hide', 'cost': ['L'], 'damage': '0', 'effect': "Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from—and effects of—attacks done to this Pokémon."}]
Flavor Text: The extension and contraction of its muscles generates electricity. It glows when in trouble.

Name: Rotom
Attacks: [{'name': 'Assault Laser', 'cost': ['C'], 'damage': '20+', 'effect': "If your opponent's Active Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool attached, this attack does 30 more damage."}]
Flavor Text: Its electricity-like body can enter some kinds of machines and take control in order to make mischief.

Name: Drifloon
Attacks: [{'name': 'Expand', 'cost': ['P'], 'damage': '10', 'effect': "During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes −20 damage from attacks."}]
Flavor Text: It is whispered that any child who mistakes Drifloon for a balloon and holds on to it could wind up missing.

Name: Mesprit
Attacks: [{'name': 'Supreme Blast', 'cost': ['PPP'], 'damage': '160', 'effect': 'You can use this attack only if you have Uxie and Azelf on your Bench. Discard all Energy from this Pokémon.'}]
Flavor Text: Known as “The Being of Emotion.” It taught humans the nobility of sorrow, pain, and joy.

Name: Giratina
Attacks: [{'name': 'Spooky Shot', 'cost': ['PPC'], 'damage': '70', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: This Pokémon is said to live in a world on the reverse side of ours, where common knowledge is distorted and strange.

Name: Cresselia
Attacks: [{'name': 'Moonlight Gain', 'cost': ['PP'], 'damage': '50', 'effect': 'Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.'}]
Flavor Text: Shiny particles are released from its wings like a veil. It is said to represent the crescent moon.

Name: Rhyperior
Attacks: [{'name': 'Mountain Swing', 'cost': ['FFFC'], 'damage': '150', 'effect': 'Discard the top 3 cards of your deck.'}]
Flavor Text: It can load up to three projectiles per arm into the holes in its hands. What launches out of those holes could be either rocks or Roggenrola.

Name: Lucario
Attacks: [{'name': 'Submarine Blow', 'cost': ['FF'], 'damage': '40', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: It’s said that no foe can remain invisible to Lucario, since it can detect auras—even those of foes it could not otherwise see.

Name: Hippopotas
Attacks: [{'name': 'Rolling Tackle', 'cost': ['FFC'], 'damage': '60', 'effect': ''}]

Name: Spiritomb
Attacks: [{'name': 'Swirling Disaster', 'cost': ['C'], 'damage': '0', 'effect': "This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon."}]

Attacks: [{'name': 'Group Beatdown', 'cost': ['DD'], 'damage': '20x', 'effect': 'Flip a coin for each Pokémon you have in play. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.'}]

Attacks: [{'name': 'Steel Tackle', 'cost': ['MMM'], 'damage': '110', 'effect': 'This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.'}]

Attacks: [{'name': 'Growth Spurt', 'cost': ['C'], 'damage': '0', 'effect': 'Take a [G] Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon.'}]
Flavor Text: Though it may look like it’s just a bunch of eggs, it’s a proper Pokémon. Exeggcute communicates with others of its kind via telepathy, apparently.

Name: Exeggutor
Attacks: [{'name': 'Psychic', 'cost': ['GCCC'], 'damage': '80+', 'effect': "This attack does 20 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon."}]
Flavor Text: Each of Exeggutor’s three heads is thinking different thoughts. The three don’t seem to be very interested in one another.

Name: Celebi ex
Attacks: [{'name': 'Powerful Bloom', 'cost': ['GC'], 'damage': '50x', 'effect': 'Flip a coin for each Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.'}]

Name: Snivy
Attacks: [{'name': 'Vine Whip', 'cost': ['GC'], 'damage': '40', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: Being exposed to sunlight makes its movements swifter. It uses vines more adeptly than its hands.

Name: Servine
Attacks: [{'name': 'Vine Whip', 'cost': ['GC'], 'damage': '50', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: It moves along the ground as if sliding. Its swift movements befuddle its foes, and it then attacks with a vine whip.

Name: Serperior
Attacks: [{'name': 'Solar Beam', 'cost': ['GCCC'], 'damage': '70', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: It only gives its all against strong opponents who are not fazed by the glare from Serperior’s noble eyes.

Name: Morelull
Attacks: [{'name': 'Ram', 'cost': ['G'], 'damage': '20', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: Pokémon living in the forest eat the delicious caps on Morelull’s head. The caps regrow overnight.

Name: Shiinotic
Attacks: [{'name': 'Flickering Spores', 'cost': ['GG'], 'damage': '50', 'effect': "Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep."}]
Flavor Text: Its flickering spores lure in prey and put them to sleep. Once this Pokémon has its prey snoozing, it drains their vitality with its fingertips.

Name: Dhelmise
Attacks: [{'name': 'Energy Whip', 'cost': ['G'], 'damage': '20+', 'effect': 'If this Pokémon has at least 3 extra [G] Energy attached, this attack does 70 more damage.'}]
Flavor Text: After a piece of seaweed merged with debris from a sunken ship, it was reborn as this ghost Pokémon.

Name: Ponyta
Attacks: [{'name': 'Stomp', 'cost': ['R'], 'damage': '10+', 'effect': 'Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.'}]
Flavor Text: It can’t run properly when it’s newly born. As it races around with others of its kind, its legs grow stronger.

Name: Rapidash
Attacks: [{'name': 'Rising Lunge', 'cost': ['RC'], 'damage': '40+', 'effect': 'Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 60 more damage.'}]
Flavor Text: This Pokémon can be seen galloping through fields at speeds of up to 150 mph, its fiery mane fluttering in the wind.

Name: Magmar
Attacks: [{'name': 'Fire Blast', 'cost': ['RR'], 'damage': '80', 'effect': 'Discard 2 [R] Energy from this Pokémon.'}]
Flavor Text: Magmar dispatches its prey with fire. But it regrets this habit once it realizes that it has burned its intended prey to a charred crisp.

Name: Larvesta
Attacks: [{'name': 'Combustion', 'cost': ['RC'], 'damage': '30', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: This Pokémon was called the Larva That Stole the Sun. The fire Larvesta spouts from its horns can cut right through a sheet of iron.

Name: Volcarona
Attacks: [{'name': 'Volcanic Ash', 'cost': ['RRC'], 'damage': '0', 'effect': "Discard 2 [R] Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 80 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon."}]
Flavor Text: Its burning body causes it to be unpopular in hot parts of the world, but in cold ones, Volcarona is revered as an embodiment of the sun.

Name: Salandit
Attacks: [{'name': 'Venoshock', 'cost': ['C'], 'damage': '10+', 'effect': "If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Poisoned, this attack does 40 more damage."}]
Flavor Text: It taunts its prey and lures them into narrow, rocky areas where it then sprays them with toxic gas to make them dizzy and take them down.

Name: Salazzle
Attacks: [{'name': 'Poison Claws', 'cost': ['R'], 'damage': '30', 'effect': "Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned."}]
Flavor Text: Salazzle makes its opponents light-headed with poisonous gas, then captivates them with alluring movements to turn them into loyal servants.

Name: Magikarp
Attacks: [{'name': 'Leap Out', 'cost': ['W'], 'damage': '0', 'effect': 'Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.'}]
Flavor Text: An underpowered, pathetic Pokémon. It may jump high on rare occasions but never more than seven feet.

Name: Gyarados ex
Attacks: [{'name': 'Rampaging Whirlpool', 'cost': ['WWWC'], 'damage': '140', 'effect': "Discard a random Energy from among the Energy attached to all Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's)."}]

Name: Vaporeon
Attacks: [{'name': 'Wave Splash', 'cost': ['WCC'], 'damage': '60', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: It lives close to water. Its long tail is ridged with a fin, which is often mistaken for a mermaid’s.

Name: Finneon
Attacks: [{'name': 'Water Gun', 'cost': ['W'], 'damage': '20', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: The line running down its side can store sunlight. It shines vividly at night.

Name: Lumineon
Attacks: [{'name': 'Aqua Liner', 'cost': ['WW'], 'damage': '0', 'effect': "This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon."}]
Flavor Text: With its shining light, it lures its prey close. However, the light also happens to attract ferocious fish Pokémon—its natural predators.

Name: Chewtle
Attacks: [{'name': 'Bite', 'cost': ['WC'], 'damage': '30', 'effect': ''}]
Flavor Text: Its large front tooth is still growing in. When the tooth itches, this Pokémon will bite another Chewtle’s horn, and the two Pokémon will tussle.

Name: Drednaw
Attacks: [{'name': 'Crunch', 'cost': ['WWW'], 'damage': '70', 'effect': "Flip a coin. If heads, discard a random Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon."}]
